name: superpowers-plus
description: Workflow orchestration wrapping superpowers — front-to-back feature-building, enhanced plan writing with the Living Document Contract, adversarial plan review, structured handoffs, and the full bug-hunt, health-review, and performance-audit workflows (hunter methodologies + project health review + multi-lane performance review + cycle skills, all in one plugin)

interface.longDescription: Thirteen workflow skills that wrap superpowers into front-to-back workflows: build-robust-features (brainstorm + adversarial design review + delegated planning); writing-plans-enhanced (subagent-proofing + Living Document Contract); plan-review-cycle (adversarial multi-round plan review); handoff (structured context preservation); bug-hunter-exploratory / bug-hunter-holistic / bug-hunter-multipass / bug-hunter-differential (four correctness-only hunter methodologies); bug-hunt-cycle (parallel hunter dispatch + cross-validation + remediation plan); project-health-review (five-axis adversarial dispatch); health-review-cycle (validation + remediation plan around the five-axis review); performance-audit (multi-lane performance review with version-aware currency brief + execution-cost map); and performance-audit-cycle (cross-validation + measurement-gated remediation plan around the performance review). All sibling skills, no cross-plugin runtime deps.
